---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for MotionFolio
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem / motivation

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. "I'm always frustrated
when [...]".

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've
considered.

## Area

Which part of the starter does this affect?

- [ ] Animations / GSAP / ScrollTrigger
- [ ] Smooth scrolling (Lenis)
- [ ] Theming / Tailwind / styles
- [ ] Portfolio data / content structure
- [ ] Project case studies / detail pages
- [ ] AI terminal assistant
- [ ] Accessibility (`prefers-reduced-motion`, etc.)
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Other

## Additional context

Add any mockups, screenshots, links, or references here.
